summary: POTUS retweet of the same media as the White House post: a cinematically shot, music-driven montage of Trump's Beijing arrival with a wide floodlit Great Hall of the People establishing shot, a moody slow shot of the Chinese flag at night, shallow-focus crowds waving US and Chinese flags, the Air Force One fuselage, and a White House line-art title card reading 'PRESIDENT DONALD J. TRUMP'. Empty transcript plus high music score and stylized color-graded photography make it a produced spectacle projecting grandeur and statesmanlike triumph. It fits the youth-appeal produced category as a trailer-style, set-to-music hype edit.

script.scene: Wide cinematic establishing shot of the Great Hall of the People at night, floodlit white facade with red Chinese flags and the national emblem glowing above the entrance; press, onlookers, and a dark motorcade silhouette in the foreground. Music-driven, no speech.
Slow, moody low-angle shot of a single red Chinese flag with gold stars rippling on a pole against a deep black night sky.
Shallow-focus shot from behind rows of greeters in light blue and white outfits waving small US and Chinese flags toward the arrival, warm spotlights and a red carpet receding into the distance.
Crowd in soft focus raising red flags and US flags toward the Air Force One fuselage lettered 'UNITED STATES OF AMERICA', festive welcome atmosphere.
End title card: white line-art drawing of the White House on a black background with the caption 'PRESIDENT DONALD J. TRUMP'.

notable_text: PRESIDENT DONALD J. TRUMP; UNITED STATES OF AMERICA (Air Force One); tweet: 'The arrival everyone has waited for.'
